message:
feat(tui): add configurable keymap profiles with help overlay

- Implement KeymapProfile enum (Default, Vim, Emacs, Minimal, Custom)
  with per-profile key bindings in tui_keymap.rs (+655 lines)
- Add help_scroll and keymap fields to TuiApp state for profile-aware
  key handling in tui_app.rs
- Add render_help_overlay_sections() to tui_chrome.rs displaying
  context-sensitive keybinding help grouped by profile
- Wire tui_keymap_profile config field in config.rs with env-var parsing
  and TuiPreferences persistence in tui_persist.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
